seoTitle: Rossarden vs Round Hill — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Rossarden and Round Hill. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Rossarden vs Round Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Rossarden and Round Hill.
heading: Rossarden vs Round Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Rossarden, Tasmania and Round Hill, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Rossarden has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Round Hill (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Rossarden or Round Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Rossarden has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Round Hill scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Rossarden scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Round Hill scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Rossarden or Round Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Rossarden has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
